_README: Tantric Wellness City × Service combo pages — 5 cities × 4 services = 20 nested pages (post-pivot 2026-05). Cities: Costa Mesa CA, Newark CA, Arlington VA, Chicago IL, Brooklyn NY. Slug pattern: <city-slug>/<service-slug>.

pages.title: Tantric Full Body Massage in Costa Mesa, CA | RelaxTouch
pages.h1: Tantric Full Body Massage in Costa Mesa
pages.meta_description: Tantric Full Body Massage at RelaxTouch's Costa Mesa studio — slow, mindful, full-body session by an experienced practitioner. 60 min $230 / 30 min $200. Open 9 AM to midnight, daily.
pages.content_html:
Our signature session — slow, intentional, full-body bodywork that gives the nervous system room to actually settle. Unhurried from the first minute to the last.

Minutes from South Coast Plaza, our studio offers Orange County a calmer way to reset. If you're looking for tantric full body massage in Costa Mesa, this page lays out exactly what a session here looks like — and how to book.

What it is

Tantric Full Body Massage is the practice we built RelaxTouch around. It's a slow, full-body session — performed on a massage table, in a private room, draped in linens — in which every part of the body gets attention, and nothing is rushed. The point isn't a technique. The point is the hour itself.

What a session looks like

You arrive, we offer water, and you spend five to ten minutes with the practitioner — fully clothed — talking briefly about what brought you in. Then they step out, you settle on the table at your comfort, and the session begins.

The work moves through the back, shoulders, arms, legs, abdomen and head, slowly and deliberately. There are no fast strokes, no rushed transitions. The pace is set by the body in front of the practitioner, not by a script and a timer.

Who it's for

People who want a slower, more attentive hour than the average chain spa provides. Some clients come for stress, some for sleep, some just because the rest of life is loud. All are valid.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

How is this different from a regular Swedish massage?

Mostly pacing and intention. Swedish massage has a defined sequence and a brisk rhythm. Tantric Full Body Massage is built around slowness, full-body coverage and presence rather than technique. Many clients describe it as 'a Swedish massage that's not in a hurry.'

Is it medical?

No. RelaxTouch is a wellness practice. We don't diagnose, treat or claim to cure any medical condition. If you have a significant medical concern, please consult a licensed healthcare provider.

What's included?

The session, draped linens, premium oils, water afterwards, and a quiet moment in reception before you leave.

How do I book?

The fastest way is the phone line on our city page. We answer 9 AM to midnight, every day.

Visit our Costa Mesa studio

This service is offered at our Costa Mesa, CA location. See the city page for the studio address, direct phone line, hours, and the full list of services we offer in Costa Mesa.

Visit RelaxTouch Costa Mesa

pages.title: Sensory Massage in Costa Mesa, CA | RelaxTouch
pages.h1: Sensory Massage in Costa Mesa
pages.meta_description: Sensory Massage at RelaxTouch's Costa Mesa studio — slow, mindful, full-body session by an experienced practitioner. 60 min $230 / 30 min $200. Open 9 AM to midnight, daily.
pages.content_html:
A lighter, attentive session that gives the nervous system room to settle. Closer to feather than to deep pressure — and surprisingly effective for that.

Minutes from South Coast Plaza, our studio offers Orange County a calmer way to reset. If you're looking for sensory massage in Costa Mesa, this page lays out exactly what a session here looks like — and how to book.

What it is

Sensory Massage is a lighter cousin of our signature work — full-body, but with a much lighter touch. The pressure is slow and skin-temperature, the kind that recruits the body's calming pathways without going deep into the tissue.

It's not 'less' than a full-body session — it's a different kind of session. Some clients find it works better than deep pressure for resetting after a hard week.

What a session looks like

Same intake, same private room, same draped linens. The pacing is slow and the focus is on continuous, gentle, full-body contact. Some clients drift into half-sleep; others stay quiet but awake. Both are normal.

Who it's for

People who don't enjoy deep pressure, or who want a session that's more about the nervous system than the muscles. First-time clients often find this is the easiest way to begin.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

Is this 'real' bodywork if the pressure is light?

Yes — light, sustained, skin-temperature touch activates a specific set of nerve fibres (sometimes called CT afferents) that are strongly linked to the parasympathetic nervous system. It's a different tool than deep pressure, not a lesser one.

Can I ask for more pressure mid-session?

Of course — just say so. If you want a fuller-pressure session, our Tantric Full Body or Deep Body Connection work is probably the better starting point.

How do I book?

Phone line on our city page. Open every day from 9 AM to midnight.

Visit our Costa Mesa studio

This service is offered at our Costa Mesa, CA location. See the city page for the studio address, direct phone line, hours, and the full list of services we offer in Costa Mesa.

Visit RelaxTouch Costa Mesa

pages.title: Slow Touch Massage in Costa Mesa, CA | RelaxTouch
pages.h1: Slow Touch Massage in Costa Mesa
pages.meta_description: Slow Touch Massage at RelaxTouch's Costa Mesa studio — slow, mindful, full-body session by an experienced practitioner. 60 min $230 / 30 min $200. Open 9 AM to midnight, daily.
pages.content_html:
Entry-level tantric bodywork — gentle, unhurried, the easiest place to start if it's your first session.

Minutes from South Coast Plaza, our studio offers Orange County a calmer way to reset. If you're looking for slow touch massage in Costa Mesa, this page lays out exactly what a session here looks like — and how to book.

What it is

Slow Touch Massage is the session we recommend for most first-time clients. It's full-body, gentle, and built to ease people into the pace of tantric bodywork without surprise. Nothing about it is intense; everything about it is unhurried.

What a session looks like

The same structure as our other sessions — intake, private room, draped linens — but the session itself is built around slow, predictable, comfortable contact. There's no element of surprise, no sudden change of pace.

The point is to give a body that may not have experienced this kind of session before a clear, easy first taste. If it's the right modality for you, we can deepen the work in future sessions; if you find a different style suits you better, that's also useful information.

Who it's for

First-time clients. People who want a session that's more about settling than about going somewhere. People with body-related anxiety who need to know what's coming.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

How is this different from Sensory Massage?

Slow Touch is structurally simpler and slower-paced — it's designed for predictability. Sensory Massage uses a wider range of light-touch techniques and assumes the client is comfortable with the format. Both are gentle; Slow Touch is gentler still.

Can I book this if I've had massage before but never tantric?

Absolutely. Slow Touch is for anyone new to this kind of session, even if you're an experienced massage client.

What if I decide I want more pressure?

Just say so. The practitioner will adjust, or recommend a different style for next time.

How do I book?

Phone line on our city page. We answer 9 AM to midnight, every day.

Visit our Costa Mesa studio

This service is offered at our Costa Mesa, CA location. See the city page for the studio address, direct phone line, hours, and the full list of services we offer in Costa Mesa.

Visit RelaxTouch Costa Mesa

pages.title: Deep Body Connection Massage in Costa Mesa, CA | RelaxTouch
pages.h1: Deep Body Connection Massage in Costa Mesa
pages.meta_description: Deep Body Connection Massage at RelaxTouch's Costa Mesa studio — slow, mindful, full-body session by an experienced practitioner. 60 min $230 / 30 min $200. Open 9 AM to midnight, daily.
pages.content_html:
Fuller-contact bodywork for people who want a more grounded session — slower than Swedish, deeper than our other tantric work.

Minutes from South Coast Plaza, our studio offers Orange County a calmer way to reset. If you're looking for deep body connection massage in Costa Mesa, this page lays out exactly what a session here looks like — and how to book.

What it is

Deep Body Connection Massage is our more substantial session — fuller contact, more pressure, and the same unhurried pacing as the rest of our work. It's the session most clients move into after a few months of regular practice.

What a session looks like

Same intake, same private room, same draped linens. The work moves through the back, shoulders, hips, legs and abdomen with more pressure than our Slow Touch or Sensory sessions, and with sustained holding rather than fast strokes. Most clients describe it as feeling 'fuller' or 'deeper' rather than 'harder'.

Who it's for

Clients who want a session that's more present in the body — more tactile, more grounded — than our lighter modalities. People who carry physical tension and want it addressed without the brisk pacing of a sports or deep tissue massage.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

Is this like a deep tissue massage?

Not really. Deep tissue is fast and clinically focused — it works specific muscles and connective tissue with the goal of releasing them. Deep Body Connection is slower, fuller-body, and built around presence rather than specific release. Different tools, different feel.

Should I start here as a new client?Most new clients do better starting with Slow Touch or Tantric Full Body, and moving here once the format feels familiar. If you have specific reasons to want fuller contact from the first session, just mention it at booking.

What if it's too much?

Tell the practitioner. We adjust pressure constantly within a session — your comfort is the whole point.

How do I book?

Phone line on our city page. Open every day from 9 AM to midnight.

Visit our Costa Mesa studio

This service is offered at our Costa Mesa, CA location. See the city page for the studio address, direct phone line, hours, and the full list of services we offer in Costa Mesa.

Visit RelaxTouch Costa Mesa

People who want a slower, more attentive hour than the average chain spa provides. Some clients come for stress, some for sleep, some just because the rest of life is loud. All are valid.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

How is this different from a regular Swedish massage?

Mostly pacing and intention. Swedish massage has a defined sequence and a brisk rhythm. Tantric Full Body Massage is built around slowness, full-body coverage and presence rather than technique. Many clients describe it as 'a Swedish massage that's not in a hurry.'

Is it medical?

No. RelaxTouch is a wellness practice. We don't diagnose, treat or claim to cure any medical condition. If you have a significant medical concern, please consult a licensed healthcare provider.

What's included?

The session, draped linens, premium oils, water afterwards, and a quiet moment in reception before you leave.

How do I book?

The fastest way is the phone line on our city page. We answer 9 AM to midnight, every day.

Visit our Chicago studio

pages.title: Sensory Massage in Chicago, IL | RelaxTouch
pages.h1: Sensory Massage in Chicago
pages.meta_description: Sensory Massage at RelaxTouch's Chicago studio — slow, mindful, full-body session by an experienced practitioner. 60 min $230 / 30 min $200. Open 9 AM to midnight, daily.
pages.content_html:
A lighter, attentive session that gives the nervous system room to settle. Closer to feather than to deep pressure — and surprisingly effective for that.

Chicago's quiet alternative to the chain spa — small, modern, focused on slow attentive bodywork. If you're looking for sensory massage in Chicago, this page lays out exactly what a session here looks like — and how to book.

What it is

Sensory Massage is a lighter cousin of our signature work — full-body, but with a much lighter touch. The pressure is slow and skin-temperature, the kind that recruits the body's calming pathways without going deep into the tissue.

It's not 'less' than a full-body session — it's a different kind of session. Some clients find it works better than deep pressure for resetting after a hard week.

What a session looks like

Same intake, same private room, same draped linens. The pacing is slow and the focus is on continuous, gentle, full-body contact. Some clients drift into half-sleep; others stay quiet but awake. Both are normal.

Who it's for

People who don't enjoy deep pressure, or who want a session that's more about the nervous system than the muscles. First-time clients often find this is the easiest way to begin.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

Is this 'real' bodywork if the pressure is light?

Yes — light, sustained, skin-temperature touch activates a specific set of nerve fibres (sometimes called CT afferents) that are strongly linked to the parasympathetic nervous system. It's a different tool than deep pressure, not a lesser one.

Can I ask for more pressure mid-session?

Of course — just say so. If you want a fuller-pressure session, our Tantric Full Body or Deep Body Connection work is probably the better starting point.

How do I book?

Phone line on our city page. Open every day from 9 AM to midnight.

Visit our Chicago studio

This service is offered at our Chicago, IL location. See the city page for the studio address, direct phone line, hours, and the full list of services we offer in Chicago.

pages.title: Slow Touch Massage in Chicago, IL | RelaxTouch
pages.h1: Slow Touch Massage in Chicago
pages.meta_description: Slow Touch Massage at RelaxTouch's Chicago studio — slow, mindful, full-body session by an experienced practitioner. 60 min $230 / 30 min $200. Open 9 AM to midnight, daily.
pages.content_html:
Entry-level tantric bodywork — gentle, unhurried, the easiest place to start if it's your first session.

Chicago's quiet alternative to the chain spa — small, modern, focused on slow attentive bodywork. If you're looking for slow touch massage in Chicago, this page lays out exactly what a session here looks like — and how to book.

What it is

Slow Touch Massage is the session we recommend for most first-time clients. It's full-body, gentle, and built to ease people into the pace of tantric bodywork without surprise. Nothing about it is intense; everything about it is unhurried.

What a session looks like

The same structure as our other sessions — intake, private room, draped linens — but the session itself is built around slow, predictable, comfortable contact. There's no element of surprise, no sudden change of pace.

The point is to give a body that may not have experienced this kind of session before a clear, easy first taste. If it's the right modality for you, we can deepen the work in future sessions; if you find a different style suits you better, that's also useful information.

Who it's for

First-time clients. People who want a session that's more about settling than about going somewhere. People with body-related anxiety who need to know what's coming.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

How is this different from Sensory Massage?

Slow Touch is structurally simpler and slower-paced — it's designed for predictability. Sensory Massage uses a wider range of light-touch techniques and assumes the client is comfortable with the format. Both are gentle; Slow Touch is gentler still.

Can I book this if I've had massage before but never tantric?

Absolutely. Slow Touch is for anyone new to this kind of session, even if you're an experienced massage client.

What if I decide I want more pressure?

Just say so. The practitioner will adjust, or recommend a different style for next time.

How do I book?

Phone line on our city page. We answer 9 AM to midnight, every day.

Visit our Chicago studio

pages.title: Deep Body Connection Massage in Chicago, IL | RelaxTouch
pages.h1: Deep Body Connection Massage in Chicago
pages.meta_description: Deep Body Connection Massage at RelaxTouch's Chicago studio — slow, mindful, full-body session by an experienced practitioner. 60 min $230 / 30 min $200. Open 9 AM to midnight, daily.
pages.content_html:
Fuller-contact bodywork for people who want a more grounded session — slower than Swedish, deeper than our other tantric work.

Chicago's quiet alternative to the chain spa — small, modern, focused on slow attentive bodywork. If you're looking for deep body connection massage in Chicago, this page lays out exactly what a session here looks like — and how to book.

What it is

Deep Body Connection Massage is our more substantial session — fuller contact, more pressure, and the same unhurried pacing as the rest of our work. It's the session most clients move into after a few months of regular practice.

What a session looks like

Same intake, same private room, same draped linens. The work moves through the back, shoulders, hips, legs and abdomen with more pressure than our Slow Touch or Sensory sessions, and with sustained holding rather than fast strokes. Most clients describe it as feeling 'fuller' or 'deeper' rather than 'harder'.

Who it's for

Clients who want a session that's more present in the body — more tactile, more grounded — than our lighter modalities. People who carry physical tension and want it addressed without the brisk pacing of a sports or deep tissue massage.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

Is this like a deep tissue massage?

Not really. Deep tissue is fast and clinically focused — it works specific muscles and connective tissue with the goal of releasing them. Deep Body Connection is slower, fuller-body, and built around presence rather than specific release. Different tools, different feel.

Should I start here as a new client?Most new clients do better starting with Slow Touch or Tantric Full Body, and moving here once the format feels familiar. If you have specific reasons to want fuller contact from the first session, just mention it at booking.

What if it's too much?

Tell the practitioner. We adjust pressure constantly within a session — your comfort is the whole point.

How do I book?

Phone line on our city page. Open every day from 9 AM to midnight.

Visit our Chicago studio

This service is offered at our Chicago, IL location. See the city page for the studio address, direct phone line, hours, and the full list of services we offer in Chicago.

pages.h1: Tantric Full Body Massage in Brooklyn
pages.meta_description: Tantric Full Body Massage at RelaxTouch's Brooklyn studio — slow, mindful, full-body session by an experienced practitioner. 60 min $230 / 30 min $200. Open 9 AM to midnight, daily.
pages.content_html:
Our signature session — slow, intentional, full-body bodywork that gives the nervous system room to actually settle. Unhurried from the first minute to the last.

The kind of quiet tantric studio Brooklyn was missing — built for the pace of New York. If you're looking for tantric full body massage in Brooklyn, this page lays out exactly what a session here looks like — and how to book.

What it is

Tantric Full Body Massage is the practice we built RelaxTouch around. It's a slow, full-body session — performed on a massage table, in a private room, draped in linens — in which every part of the body gets attention, and nothing is rushed. The point isn't a technique. The point is the hour itself.

What a session looks like

You arrive, we offer water, and you spend five to ten minutes with the practitioner — fully clothed — talking briefly about what brought you in. Then they step out, you settle on the table at your comfort, and the session begins.

The work moves through the back, shoulders, arms, legs, abdomen and head, slowly and deliberately. There are no fast strokes, no rushed transitions. The pace is set by the body in front of the practitioner, not by a script and a timer.

Who it's for

People who want a slower, more attentive hour than the average chain spa provides. Some clients come for stress, some for sleep, some just because the rest of life is loud. All are valid.

Pricing

  • 60 minutes — $230
  • 30 minutes — $200

Frequently asked questions

How is this different from a regular Swedish massage?

Mostly pacing and intention. Swedish massage has a defined sequence and a brisk rhythm. Tantric Full Body Massage is built around slowness, full-body coverage and presence rather than technique. Many clients describe it as 'a Swedish massage that's not in a hurry.'

Is it medical?

No. RelaxTouch is a wellness practice. We don't diagnose, treat or claim to cure any medical condition. If you have a significant medical concern, please consult a licensed healthcare provider.

What's included?

The session, draped linens, premium oils, water afterwards, and a quiet moment in reception before you leave.

How do I book?

The fastest way is the phone line on our city page. We answer 9 AM to midnight, every day.

Visit our Brooklyn studio
